title: NEBOSH International General Certificate (IGC)
description: The world's most recognised health and safety qualification. Covers hazard identification, risk assessment, management systems, and regulatory compliance. Delivered over 2 intensive weeks with live coaching, mock exams, and full study materials.

title: IOSH Managing Safely
description: The IOSH Managing Safely certificate is ideal for managers and supervisors who need practical safety knowledge. Covers risk assessment, incident investigation, and legal responsibilities in a highly interactive format.

title: ISO 45001 Lead Auditor
description: Become a certified ISO 45001 Lead Auditor. Covers the full audit lifecycle — planning, executing, reporting, and following up — aligned with ISO 19011 guidelines. Ideal for those implementing and auditing OHSMS.

title: AI for HSE Professionals
description: Practical AI literacy for safety professionals — no coding required. Learn to use AI tools for incident analysis, document review, risk assessment, and safety reporting. Includes hands-on workshop with real AI platforms.

title: NEBOSH Oil & Gas Certificate
description: Specialist NEBOSH qualification for those working in oil, gas, and petrochemical sectors. Covers process safety, major hazards, offshore and onshore operations, and sector-specific regulatory frameworks.

title: Power BI for HSE Professionals
description: Learn to build professional HSE dashboards in Microsoft Power BI from scratch. Data modelling, DAX measures, KPI visuals, incident tracking, training compliance, and executive reporting — no prior Power BI experience required.

title: NEBOSH National Diploma in OSH
description: The most advanced NEBOSH qualification — equivalent to a degree-level HSE award. Covers management of health and safety, workplace and work equipment hazards, and a 12,000-word applied project. For experienced safety professionals seeking senior roles.

title: ISO 45001 Internal Auditor
description: Equips participants to plan and conduct internal audits of an ISO 45001 Occupational Health & Safety Management System. Covers audit principles, techniques, checklist development, non-conformance reporting, and corrective action follow-up.
